The '''''Crusader's Shield''''' was a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Osted Alater]]. It was stationed in the [[Albanin sector/Legends|Albanin sector]].

{{Ship-stub}}
